case_title: GEORGE E SIBTHORP VS. RICHARD GEORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $729.00 FILED BY SIBTHORP, GEORGE E AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
